scripts.openapi:sync: npm run openapi:generate -w @autocare/server && npm run generate:types -w @autocare/api-client
scripts.dev:web-stack: npm run openapi:sync && turbo run dev --parallel --filter=@autocare/server --filter=@autocare/web
scripts.dev:stack: npm run openapi:sync && turbo run dev --parallel --filter=@autocare/server --filter=@autocare/web --filter=@autocare/mobile
scripts.verify: npm run typecheck && npm run lint
scripts.db:bootstrap: npm run db:migrate && npm run db:reset && npm run db:seed
scripts.phase0:verify:local: npm run phase0:integrity-gate -w @autocare/server && npm run phase0:gate -w @autocare/server
scripts.db:from-scratch: npm run db:down:volumes && npm run db:start && npm run db:bootstrap && npm run phase0:verify:local
scripts.verify:affiliate:disclosure-guards: npm run test:vitest -w @autocare/server -- src/modules/affiliate/__tests__/affiliate-http.integration.test.ts src/interfaces/http/openapi/__tests__/registry.contract.test.ts && npm run test:vitest -w @autocare/api-client -- src/affiliate-contract.test.ts && npm run typecheck -w @autocare/server && npm run typecheck -w @autocare/api-client
